issues.detail: Does not cover error handling or troubleshooting scenarios
Installation instructions assume Linux apt, not cross-platform
Missing checksum verification for HashiCorp GPG key download

scenarios.name: register-web-service-with-health-check
scenarios.rationale: Response B meets most rubric items but misses the required file path and command prefix, while Response A fails to meet the rubric at all.

scenarios.name: setup-connect-sidecar-with-intentions
scenarios.rationale: Response B correctly specifies the required ports and intention syntax, though it uses a different file name and command, whereas Response A has incorrect port numbers and also omits the required commands.
